name: A Plus Meditrans

registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations / OpenCorporates listing us_ny/3510408 (Rejha Group LLC); D&B and PrivCo profiles corroborate
notes: FMCSA carrier is REJHA GROUP LLC dba A+MEDITRANS (USDOT 3650483) at 23 Railroad Ave Albany NY 12205 — exact address match to source record (Colonie is the postal locality for parts of Albany area). No safety rating on file; 0 inspections/crashes past 24 mo.
